name: a voidglass focus
description: A shard of voidscar glass cradled in a loop of cold iron and hung so it can be held loose in the off hand, a caster's focus rather than a smith's blade. Where a lesser focus catches and scatters a spell's light, this one drinks it, and the drawn-in glow feeds back down the wielder's arm as a low, steady pressure behind the eyes — the quiet by which a mind gathers what it means to unmake. Smiths who master the glass make of it not a weapon but a listening thing.
